name: Naraka - The Hell Realm
description: The Hell Realm of Naraka, split between the frozen wastes of the north and the burning badlands of the south, divided by an impassable mountain range.

location_names._comment: Tibetan/Sanskrit compound place names drawn randomly when placing town-type objects. Ro=corpse, Nag=black, Dur=charnel, Trak=blood, Mun=darkness, Jik=fear, Shi=death, Bar=blazing, Me=fire, Gang=glacier, Drang=cold, Drag=fierce. khar=fort, thang=plain, yul=land, lung=valley, ri=mountain, dzong=citadel, pura=city.

data.description: A shimmering portal to the Hungry Ghost Realm.

events.name: The Court of the Musician Prince

pickups.name: Abandoned Cart
pickups.message: A cart left behind by someone in a hurry.

pickups.name: Frozen Corpse
pickups.message: Someone didn't make it. They left a little gold.

pickups.name: Warm Spring
pickups.message: A rare pocket of warmth in the frozen wastes.

pickups.name: Prayer Flags
pickups.message: Someone planted these here. The effort means something.

pickups.name: Frozen Fountain
pickups.message: The water beneath the ice is still flowing.

pickups.name: Frozen Spring
pickups.message: A pool trapped under ice, faintly warm at the center.

pickups.name: Mourning Flame
pickups.message: A small fire that never goes out, tended by a weeping shade.

pickups.name: Ice Shrine
pickups.message: A frozen stupa, offerings still visible inside the ice.

pickups.name: Frosted Relic
pickups.message: A fragment of something holy, long corrupted by cold.

pickups.name: Shivering Cairn
pickups.message: Stones stacked by countless suffering hands.

pickups.name: Sorrow Pool
pickups.message: Tears of the damned, gathered over eons.

pickups.name: Soul Well
pickups.message: You can feel the outlines of strange memories.

pickups.name: Forgotten Grave
pickups.message: A rare act of caring for the dead in the Hells.

pickups.name: Devil's Charm
pickups.message: Still humming with whispered mantras.

pickups.name: Magic Well
pickups.message: Shimmering with power.

pickups.name: Twisted Idol
pickups.message: You feel sick looking into its eyes.

pickups.name: Old Battlefield
pickups.message: Carrion crows pick what's left from the fallen.

pickups.name: Wayside Shrine
pickups.message: If you want a good omen, you have to make it yourself.

pickups.name: Bone Pile
pickups.message: Frozen bones, stripped clean long ago. Something useful is lodged among them.

pickups.name: Eerie Cold Patch
pickups.message: The cold here feels different. Wrong.

pickups.name: Warm Glow
pickups.message: It looks like a flame shrine. Something is off.

pickups.name: Frozen Offering
pickups.message: Someone left food for the shades. It's still edible — barely.

pickups.name: Abandoned Shrine Offerings
pickups.message: Ritual cakes and grain, preserved by the cold.

events.name: The Court of the Musician Prince

pickups.name: Scorched Supplies
pickups.message: Someone's emergency stash, half-melted.

pickups.name: Lava Crystal
pickups.message: A chunk of solidified magma with a gem inside.

pickups.name: Ember Pool
pickups.message: Tepid, grey, but restorative in this land of extremes.

pickups.name: Fireproof Cache
pickups.message: Whoever hid this planned ahead.

pickups.name: Lava Vent
pickups.message: The air quivers with heat above the cracked rock.

pickups.name: Burning Altar
pickups.message: The offerings still smolder upon the black stone.

pickups.name: Pain Altar
pickups.message: Clarity through pain.

pickups.name: Ember Cache
pickups.message: A hidden stash, kept warm in volcanic rock.

pickups.name: Experience Stone
pickups.message: When you touch it, your mind becomes strangely sparkly.

pickups.name: Ashen Spring
pickups.message: In a land of fire, ash brings cool relief.

pickups.name: Soul Well
pickups.message: You can feel the outlines of strange memories.

pickups.name: Forgotten Grave
pickups.message: A rare act of caring for the dead in the Hells.

pickups.name: Devil's Charm
pickups.message: Still humming with whispered mantras.

pickups.name: Magic Well
pickups.message: Shimmering with power.

pickups.name: Twisted Idol
pickups.message: You feel sick looking into its eyes.

pickups.name: Old Battlefield
pickups.message: Carrion crows pick what's left from the fallen.

pickups.name: Wayside Shrine
pickups.message: If you want a good omen, you have to make it yourself.

pickups.name: Charred Bone Pile
pickups.message: Ash and scorched bones. Something metallic survived the heat.

pickups.name: Flickering Light
pickups.message: It looks like a burning altar. It is not.

pickups.name: Cracked Stone
pickups.message: Looks like a cache. It's a trap.

pickups.name: Demon's Larder
pickups.message: Whatever they were keeping here, it's edible enough.

pickups.name: Scorched Offering Bowl
pickups.message: Still-warm grain and dried flesh. The offering holds.
